name: Ubiquiti Power Adapter POE-15-12W
title: Ubiquiti Power Adapter POE-15-12W
title_extended: Genuine Ubiquiti PoE-15-12W Power Adapter for airMAX & UniFi Devices

detailed_description.heading: Ubiquiti POE-15-12W Overview
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti POE-15-12W is a dedicated Power over Ethernet (PoE) adapter designed to deliver both power and data through a single Ethernet cable, facilitating streamlined and efficient installations. This adapter is ideal for powering Ubiquiti devices that require a 15V power supply, such as certain models from the airMAX and UniFi product lines that are designed for less power-intensive applications. The POE-15-12W model is engineered to provide reliable performance in a compact and user-friendly format.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
Surge protection
Clamping protection
Maximum surge discharge
Peak pulse current
AC cable with earth ground

detailed_description.heading: Power Specifications
detailed_description.text: The POE-15-12W outputs 15V DC at 0.8A, totaling a power output of 12 watts. This specification is suitable for small-scale devices that do not require high power input but still benefit from the simplified cabling and installation that PoE offers. The adapter operates with high efficiency, minimizing energy waste and reducing operating costs over time.

detailed_description.heading: Protection and Certifications
detailed_description.text: This adapter includes built-in surge protection, which protects connected devices from voltage spikes and power surges that can occur in unstable electrical environments. Additionally, it features overcurrent protection, which prevents damage to the device by cutting off the power in case of an overload, thereby enhancing the overall durability and reliability of the network setup. In addition, the Ubiquiti POE-15-12W adheres to strict safety and quality standards, including certifications from CE, FCC, and IC. These certifications ensure that the adapter meets international safety guidelines and is safe for use in a wide range of residential and commercial settings.
